name: Network DoS Attack Detected
notes: Reports network Denial of Service (DoS) attacks on a system.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Network DoS Attack with the same QID more than 3 times
conditions_text: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Network DoS Attack with the same QID more than 3 times, across more than 0 destination IP within 5 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Network DoS Attack with the same QID more than 3 times, across more than 0 destination IP within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Network DoS Attack Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Network DoS Attack with the same QID more than 3 times, across more than 0 destination IP within 5 minutes
